prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年厦门大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约39561名、35955名、28246名、20550名、22365名。整体呈显著前移趋势，2021至2024年累计前移约19000名，但2025年较2024年小幅后移约1815名，出现企稳信号；2025年基准位次约22365名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年139人、2022年133人、2023年131人、2024年144人、2025年145人；2026年计划仅97人，较2025年大幅缩减约33.1%，为近六年最低。大幅缩招将显著加剧竞争，推动录取位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第24–26名（2026年约第25名），属国内顶尖高校梯队，对考生持续具有强吸引力；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（录取断档或投档线异常信号）；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，涉及校园安全、学校管理回应及录取断档等舆情。抖音热度方面，厦门大学在总排名中位列第5（高热），2022–2024年各年均居高热前列，短视频平台曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温。声誉负面与抖音高热形成对冲，整体报考心理复杂；第五轮学科评估中，厦门大学A-及以上学科共14个，包括：化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A、法学A-、数学A-、理论经济学A-、社会学A-、马克思主义理论A-、化学工程与技术A-。优势学科覆盖经管法理工农医等多个门类，学科实力均衡强劲，对高分考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等为高热推荐专业，与厦门大学优势学科（统计学、化学、工商管理、法学等）形成交叉；金融/财经/经济类呈分化观望，法学呈分化观望。浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年约29.1万人大幅增加约37.6%，全省竞争显著加剧。；厦门大学位于福建省（非本省），在浙江省无本地招生倾斜。该校2021–2025年在浙江省招生人数占全国总招生比例约2.0%–2.7%，属外省中等规模招生。浙江考生对东南沿海985高校偏好较强，跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22365名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减33.1%（从145人降至97人）、浙江省考生总数增加约37.6%三重因素，录取竞争将显著加剧，推动位次前移。，已充分反映缩招效应。声誉负面舆情可能抑制部分报考热情，但抖音高热与学科实力仍维持较强吸引力，两者大致抵消。预测2026年最低录取位次约17924名，区间17424–18424名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学类（含涉外法治人才基地实验班）
- 会计学（含会计、财务、审计，含双学士学位项目）
- 统计学类（含经济统计学、统计学、数据科学）
- 经济学类（含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含AI与计算机方向）
- 数学类（含景润拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（集成电路与电子信息）
- 新闻传播学类（含双学士学位项目）
- 外国语言文学类（含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人文科学试验班（含汉语言文学、历史学、哲学等）
- 公共管理类（含双学士学位项目）
- 工商管理类（含双学士学位项目）
- 化学类（含化学国家级拔尖基地）
- 能源动力类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约17924名，区间17424–18424名。位次在区间下限（17424名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（法学、会计学、统计学类、经济学类）；位次在区间中段（约17924名）建议以二档为主（计算机类、数学类、电子信息类），搭配一档边缘专业冲刺；位次在区间上限（18424名）附近建议以三档保底为主（人文科学试验班、公共管理类、化学类），同时争取二档中热度适中的专业。注意厦大2026年大幅缩招，各专业录取位次预计整体前移，报考时需适当提高位次预期。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 39,561, 35,955, 28,246, 20,550, and 22,365, respectively. Overall, there is a significant forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 19,000 places from 2021 to 2024, but a slight backward shift of about 1,815 places in 2025 compared to 2024, indicating a stabilization signal; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 22,365. The enrollment plan for Xiamen University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category: 139 in 2021, 133 in 2022, 131 in 2023, 144 in 2024, 145 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 97, a sharp reduction of about 33.1% compared to 2025, the lowest in the past six years. The significant reduction in enrollment will markedly intensify competition, pushing the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 24th–26th in recent years (approximately 25th in 2026), placing it among the top-tier domestic universities, with sustained strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2025 Gaokao cycle is somewhat negative (signals of admission gaps or abnormal submission lines); the reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is clearly negative, involving campus safety, school management responses, and admission gap incidents. In terms of Douyin popularity, Xiamen University ranks 5th overall (high heat), consistently ranking high in popularity from 2022 to 2024, with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application attention. The negative reputation and high Douyin heat offset each other, resulting in a complex overall application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xiamen University has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Law A-, Mathematics A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, Marxist Theory A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-. The advantageous disciplines cover multiple categories such as economics, management, law, science, engineering, agriculture, and medicine, with balanced and strong disciplinary strength, exerting outstanding appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, clinical medicine, and stomatology are highly recommended popular majors, intersecting with Xiamen University's advantageous disciplines (statistics, chemistry, business administration, law, etc.); finance/banking/economics shows divergence and wait-and-see, law shows divergence and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to about 291,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition across the province. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with no local admission preference in Zhejiang Province. From 2021 to 2025, the proportion of its enrollment in Zhejiang Province to the national total enrollment was about 2.0%–2.7%, representing a medium-scale enrollment for an out-of-province university. Zhejiang candidates have a strong preference for 985 universities on the southeast coast, and cross-province application enthusiasm remains high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 22,365, the sharp 33.1% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (from 145 to 97), and the approximately 37.6% increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, admission competition will significantly intensify, pushing the ranking forward. This fully reflects the effect of the enrollment reduction. Negative reputation incidents may suppress some application enthusiasm, but high Douyin heat and disciplinary strength still maintain strong appeal, roughly offsetting each other. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 17,924, with a range of 17,424–18,424.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (including International Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Accounting (including Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Statistics (including Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Economics (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (including AI and Computer Directions)
- Mathematics (including Jingrun Top-Notch Class)
- Engineering Pilot Program (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information)
- Journalism and Communication (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Humanities Pilot Program (including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy, etc.)
- Public Administration (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Business Administration (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Chemistry (including National Top-Notch Base for Chemistry)
- Energy and Power Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 17,924, range 17,424–18,424. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 17,424) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, Accounting, Statistics, Economics); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 17,924) are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Computer Science, Mathematics, Electronic Information) while sprinting for borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (18,424) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net (Humanities Pilot Program, Public Administration, Chemistry), while also aiming for moderately popular Tier 2 majors. Note that Xiamen University's significant enrollment reduction in 2026 is expected to push admission rankings for all majors forward overall, so candidates should appropriately raise their ranking expectations when applying.
